## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run size`
- [ ] `npm run pack:check`

## Release Notes

- [ ] API docs updated when config, events, exports, or lifecycle behavior changes
- [ ] Compatibility docs updated when browser/CSP/privacy behavior changes
- [ ] Changelog or release notes updated for release-facing changes
- [ ] No secrets, private tokens, customer data, or unrelated generated files included
